items.title: Jim Cramer on Honeywell: “Charitable Trust is in This One for the Long Haul”
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer commented on. Cramer discussed the company’s upcoming spin-offs, as he commented: “I want to highlight the most unheralded Honeywell breakup, the spinoff of its advanced materials division as Solstice, followed by the spinoff of its automation business. And I really like this one… Solstice […]

items.title: Smart Infrastructure Market Surges to $2,109.5 billion by 2029 - Dominated by Siemens (Germany), Cisco, (US), Honeywell (US)
items.description: Delray Beach, FL, Oct. 14, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- According to MarketsandMarkets™, the Smart Infrastructure Market is projected to grow from USD 923.0 billion in 2024 to USD 2,109.5 billion by 2029 at a CAGR of 18.0% during the forecast period.
